name: Badge
description: Small technical label in mono type — skills, tech stack, token names, contrast values.

useCases: Keyword/tech tags on project cards and case studies
Token names and technical values in running layout

antiPatterns.scenario: Badge as an interactive filter or button
antiPatterns.reason: Badges are static labels; making them clickable hides affordance.
Badges are single terms; long text breaks the label grid.

a11y: Purely presentational <span>; the surrounding list provides semantics (aria-label on the <ul>)
